visual_description: Two men in white shirts and ties stand side by side in an office setting, one gesturing with his right arm extended toward the other. The man on the left turns his head slightly toward the other man while the man on the right looks forward with a neutral expression. A third person’s head is partially visible in the foreground, and a computer monitor is visible to the left.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a low pitch and moderate loudness, speaking at a moderate pace. There are no noticeable prosodic variations or non-speech sounds.
